phases.title: Live environment and end-to-end release verification
acceptance: deployed revision is machine-readable and must equal the expected main SHA
liveness and readiness return bounded JSON contracts
beta, live and maintenance modes are explicitly verified
authentication, upload, artifact download and restart persistence are exercised end-to-end
missing credentials, revision mismatch, non-JSON health, stale artifact or lost state fail closed

phases.title: Real image acceptance corpus
acceptance: exactly eight required hard-image categories are represented by immutable manifest entries
every fixture has a stable sha256, bounded dimensions and an explicit source license classification
SVG, PDF, EPS and DXF are mandatory for every case and bitmap embedding is forbidden
finite per-category quality thresholds and fail-closed artifact checks are machine-readable
missing fixture, hash drift, duplicate category, unbounded size, absent export or threshold regression fails closed

phases.title: Load and resilience qualification
acceptance: bounded concurrent admission rejects overload before work allocation and never exceeds the configured active plus queued budget
per-user quota and global disk budget are deterministic, observable and fail closed without deleting owned immutable artifacts
cancellation and timeout converge to terminal states without orphaned ownership, temporary files or reusable partial artifacts
restart recovery replays durable jobs exactly once and detects stale leases, corrupt manifests and remote persistence conflicts
retention cleanup is oldest-eligible-first, idempotent and preserves active, pinned and legal-hold artifacts

phases.title: Beta release gate
acceptance: a finite machine-readable release manifest records semantic version, release notes, rollback target and required production secret names without storing secret values
the release decision fails closed unless user acceptance, green mandatory CI, deploy revision equality and live health evidence are all present
the deployed revision must be an exact 40-character main SHA and must equal the approved release candidate SHA
rollback is deterministic, bounded and points to a previously qualified immutable main SHA
missing evidence, stale evidence, secret value leakage, revision mismatch or any non-green mandatory check blocks beta release
